message:
fix(core): resolve compiler warnings and dead code in data structure tests

Address clippy/rustc warnings accumulated across several data structure
modules to keep the build warning-free:

- fd_budget.rs: add missing assertion on total_allocated after pane
  overwrite to verify the known double-increment trade-off in the
  lock-free design actually produces the expected value (50)
- fenwick_tree.rs: remove unnecessary `mut` on `ft` in clone_independence
  test (the original is never mutated, only the clone is); suppress
  unused-result warnings on prefix_sum and range_sum calls in
  should_panic tests by binding to `let _`
- suffix_array.rs: replace `vec![]` with `Vec::<usize>::new()` in the
  repeated-character search test to help type inference and avoid the
  needless-collect lint
- proptest_fenwick_tree.rs: remove 3 unused strategy helper functions
  (arb_values, arb_nonneg_values, arb_updates) that were left behind
  after test refactoring; fix deprecated positional format string
  `{0}` → named `{i}` in range_sum/point_query identity assertion
- proptest_segment_tree.rs: remove unused `arb_size` function superseded
  by inline strategy in the proptest macros

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
